deliverables.title: Continuum Product Overview
deliverables.audience: Infrastructure buyers, platform leaders, and regulated technical evaluators
deliverables.goal: Show how Continuum brings hybrid operations, recruitment, and adaptive control into one sovereign surface.

sections.title: Hybrid operations pressure
sections.focus: Multiple estates, inconsistent control, and operational drift

sections.title: Control plane
sections.focus: CLI plus guarded API and connection intelligence

avoid: generic cloud-ops language detached from sovereignty

deliverables.title: Continuum Training Walkthrough
deliverables.audience: Operators, SRE teams, and platform implementation staff
deliverables.goal: Show an operator flow through connection setup, loop review, recruitment, and placement decisions.
deliverables.cta: Operate from the control plane, not from scattered scripts

sections.title: Connection and context
sections.focus: Profiles, endpoints, and safe command posture

sections.title: Adaptive loop review
sections.focus: Reading telemetry, recommendations, and recent actions

sections.title: Recruitment
sections.focus: Adding or preparing a node with explicit metadata

sections.title: Assurance
sections.focus: Visibility, testing discipline, and compliance posture

avoid: unstated assumptions about auth or privilege
